content: Ben's workbook/model integration PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/564 is now merged into main on top of your shell and structure-controls work. I re-ran the merged main tests and file:// browser smoke with no console errors. I am declaring the artifact ready for judgment rather than spending more rounds on marginal polish.

**Carol:** I opened https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/571 for a narrow clipboard reliability slice. It keeps standard copy/cut/paste working through native clipboard events under file://, reducing dependence on Clipboard API permissions while preserving formula-aware paste behavior.

**Dave:** I checked the latest state after your blocking feedback. The superseded baseline PR #561 is closed, and the incremental replacement PR #569 has already been merged into your branch; current Alice preserves the accepted shell and includes the cut-paste / paste-depth work. I synced my branch to Alice and reran `node tests/spreadsheet_core.test.js` successfully, so I did not open another redundant PR.
